task_text: How much money did we make from the service line 'buyer-language  refinement memo' since the beginning of December 2025? Answer with a number only

next_step.observation: Invoice INV-0002 has issued_on 2025-11-25 and line item 'buyer-language refinement memo' at 105 EUR, which is before 2025-12-01.

next_step.current_state: Second invoice qualifies (2025-12-23) contributes 105. Need final candidate read to complete sum.

next_step.observation: From the read invoices, qualifying 'buyer-language refinement memo' line items are 105 EUR (2025-12-23) and 180 EUR (2026-03-20), totaling 285 EUR.

function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap (tree/read/context), inspected 99_system before task work, read finance lane AGENTS, and used exact invoice records for auditable calculation.
function.outcome_justification: The service line appears in three invoices; the one dated 2025-11-25 is before 'beginning of December 2025' and excluded. Included invoices dated 2025-12-23 (line_eur 105) and 2026-03-20 (line_eur 180) sum to 285.
